Revenue-Producing Service Offers

In-demand offers for SMB and mid-market teams: pipeline visibility, booked-call automation, and monthly revenue operations continuity.

Offer ladder: 72-hour diagnostic -> 14-day engine deployment -> monthly optimization pod.

Checkout rail loading...

Talk to sales Open Control Plane Home

Every CTA emits `offer_id` attribution (`source -> offer -> conversion`) before redirecting to checkout or scheduling.

Offer 1: Revenue Leak Audit ($500)

72-hour diagnostic for teams with traffic and outreach activity but weak lead-to-close conversion visibility.

  • Lead-to-close leak map with loss points by stage
  • Attribution contract (`source -> offer_id -> conversion`) instrumentation checklist
  • 14-day cashflow fix plan prioritized by expected lift

Best for: founders and RevOps leads dealing with random pipeline outcomes.

Offer 2: Booked-Call Engine Sprint (from $2,500)

Done-with-you build of a lead capture, qualification, and follow-up system that consistently produces booked calls.

  • Inbound form + webhook + CRM routing automation
  • Email and Telegram follow-up sequences with no-drop SLAs
  • Two offer-angle tests and daily conversion scoreboard

Best for: B2B teams with active traffic but weak appointment volume.

Offer 3: Revenue Ops Pod (from $1,200/mo)

Managed continuity layer that keeps your growth automations healthy, optimized, and tied to attributable revenue every week.

  • Weekly experiment reviews with scale and kill decisions
  • Runtime guardrails, alerting, and rollback coverage for automation failures
  • Monthly revenue attribution report and next-cycle offer plan

Best for: teams that need dependable growth execution without adding full-time ops headcount.
